name: Zesty Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Dry roasted, unsalted, mixed nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the popped popcorn and mixed nuts; set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine the margarine, honey-mustard dressing, and Italian salad dressing mix.
3. Pour the mixture over the popcorn, tossing to coat well.
4. Spread the mixture in a jelly-roll pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes, stirring after 10 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven; stir in the raisins.
7. Spread on paper towels to cool.
8. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 6 cups.
